title: 👻 Chronoglyphic Hauntings
name: Chronoglyphic Hauntings
what_it_is: Hauntings encoded not in space but in time—ghosts embedded in the glyphs of a moment, bleeding through via temporal residue.
how_to_use: she reads the glyph, and the ghost reads back
his calendar trembles—the date itself is haunted
animation_behavior: Glyphs reveal hidden spirits on contact, ghosts animate when read, time-stamped phantoms emerge in pulses ---
